institutional_summary: There are no recent 13D/13G activist filings, but unusual options activity indicates strong bullish sentiment for NVDA, TSLA, AAPL, and MSFT, all of which have high confidence signals. Analyst upgrades for these tickers also support this bullish outlook, although the confidence levels for these upgrades are low due to lack of corroborating sources. Convergence signals show coordinated interest from multiple funds in NVDA and TSLA, suggesting a strong growth thesis.
